mapper.insert:
insert into t_question_import_temp ( batch_id, chunk_no, row_no, chunk_row_count, content_hash, content, answer, analysis, created_time ) values
( #{item.batchId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.chunkNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.rowNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.chunkRowCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.contentHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.answer,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.analysis,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: select id, batch_id, chunk_no, row_no, chunk_row_count, content_hash, content, answer, analysis, created_time from t_question_import_temp where batch_id = #{batchId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and chunk_no = #{chunkNo,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by row_no asc limit 1

select id, batch_id, chunk_no, row_no, chunk_row_count, content_hash, content, answer, analysis, created_time from t_question_import_temp where batch_id = #{batchId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by chunk_no asc, row_no asc
